subsection.heading: General Rules.—
subsection.chapeau: The Secretary and the Board have jurisdiction over transportation insofar as water carriers are concerned—

paragraph.content: by water carrier between a place in a State and a place in another State, even if part of the transportation is outside the United States;

paragraph.chapeau: by water carrier and motor carrier from a place in a State to a place in another State; except that if part of the transportation is outside the United States, the Secretary only has jurisdiction over that part of the transportation provided—

subparagraph.content: by motor carrier that is in the United States; and
by water carrier that is from a place in the United States to another place in the United States; and

paragraph.chapeau: by water carrier or by water carrier and motor carrier between a place in the United States and a place outside the United States, to the extent that—

subparagraph.content: when the transportation is by motor carrier, the transportation is provided in the United States;

when the transportation is by water carrier to a place outside the United States, the transportation is provided by water carrier from a place in the United States to another place in the United States before transshipment from a place in the United States to a place outside the United States; and

when the transportation is by water carrier from a place outside the United States, the transportation is provided by water carrier from a place in the United States to another place in the United States after transshipment to a place in the United States from a place outside the United States.

subsection.heading: Definitions.—
subsection.content: In this section, the terms “State” and “United States” include the territories and possessions of the United States.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: Provisions similar to those in this section were contained in section 10541 of this title prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by Pub. L. 104–88, § 102(a).

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective Jan. 1, 1996, except as otherwise provided in Pub. L. 104–88, see section 2 of Pub. L. 104–88, set out as a note under section 1301 of this title.
